name: Cigniti Technologies Limited
summary: Cigniti Technologies Limited provides software testing services worldwide. It offers quality assurance services, such as test automation, security testing, regression testing, performance testing, mobile testing, functional testing, crowdsourced testing, and compatibility testing. The company also provides quality engineering services, including agile testing, DevOps testing, service virtualization, and test data management; and digital assurance services comprising robotic process automation, medical device testing, ERP testing, big data and analytics testing, and digital assurance and testing; and test advisory and transformation services, as well as artificial intelligence testing, Internet of Things testing, and blockchain testing services. It serves the airlines, banking, communications, energy and utilities, financial services, healthcare and life sciences, insurance, logistics, manufacturing, media and entertainment, retail and ecommerce, and travel and hospitality industries. The company was formerly known as Chakkilam Infotech Limited. Cigniti Technologies Limited was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in Hyderabad, India.
